case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A VS. STEPHEN SIROTA

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW
STATEMENT OF EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100028828) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-25-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-10-2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-09-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHEN SIROTA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST HIM ON AUGUST 7, 2017 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE VACATED. MR. SIROTA HAS LEAVE TO FILE HIS PROPOSED ANSWER NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 2, 2018. DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING. AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. [302]

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-10-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steve Levy, Esq. 800-637-6922 for Plaintiff Bank of America through Court Call.
Stephen Sirota, Esq. 925-362-1555 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff contests. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT STEPHEN SIROTA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

Defendant Stephen Sirota's motion to set aside the default and default judgment entered against him on August 7, 2017 is granted. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment are vacated. Mr. Sirota has leave to file his proposed answer no later than February 2, 2018. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Defendant/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling. and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

RULING - The matter is Discussed.
